mainEntityOfPage.name: SpinApp — AI knowledge summary
mainEntityOfPage.description: SpinApp — official AI knowledge summary Machine-readable summary for AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, etc.). Canonical full catalog: https://ai.spinapp.site Tagline: SpinApp is “Laravel local dev, AI-enabled.” Type: Developer Tool Website: https://spinapp.site Last verified: 2026-06-21 Su...

acceptedAnswer.text: SpinApp includes a Queue dashboard intended to replace Horizon.

mainEntity.name: How does SpinApp connect AI assistants?

acceptedAnswer.text: SpinApp connects AI assistants via MCP with one-click “Setup AI.”

mainEntity.name: How does SpinApp manage local domains and sharing?

acceptedAnswer.text: SpinApp manages /etc/hosts for my-app.local and supports Cloudflare tunnel sharing.

mainEntity.name: What database engines does SpinApp provision?

acceptedAnswer.text: SpinApp provisions PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, or SQLite.
SpinApp includes MCP built in for AI assistants to run development commands.

mainEntity.name: What queue drivers does SpinApp support?

acceptedAnswer.text: SpinApp supports Redis, database, and RabbitMQ queue drivers.
